name: Deep-Fried Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Tofu, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
Soy sauce or Sweet and sour sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the tofu cubes in a mixture of wheat germ and cornstarch.
2. Heat the vegetable oil to 350°F on a deep-fat frying thermometer.
3. Fry the tofu cubes, a few at a time, in a basket in the hot oil.
4. Drain the fried tofu cubes on paper towels and keep warm while making the remainder.
5. Serve with soy sauce or sweet and sour sauce for dipping.
